title: Extract _finalize_run and move compliance to shared module
summary: RunController has three methods (run_issue, review_issue, accept_issue) that repeat the same gate evaluation, explain report writing, and report.json writing logic. Extract into _finalize_run(). Also move compliance helpers out of codex_harness_builder_adapter into a shared domain module.
builder_prompt:
## Goal
Refactor RunController to eliminate the repeated gate->explain->report finalization logic, and decouple compliance helpers from the builder adapter.

## Steps
1. Create src/spec_orch/domain/compliance.py with these functions moved from codex_harness_builder_adapter.py:
   - default_turn_contract_compliance()
   - evaluate_pre_action_narration_compliance()
   - PRE_ACTION_NARRATION_PATTERNS
   - _is_first_concrete_action_event()
   - _matching_pre_action_pattern()
2. Update imports in codex_harness_builder_adapter.py to import from domain.compliance
3. Update imports in review_adapter.py to import from domain.compliance
4. Update imports in run_controller.py to import from domain.compliance
5. In RunController, extract the repeated gate evaluation + explain report + report writing + gate telemetry logic from run_issue(), review_issue(), and accept_issue() into a private method:
   def _finalize_run(self, *, issue, workspace, run_id, builder, verification, review, accepted_by) -> tuple[GateVerdict, Path, Path]
6. Update all three public methods to use _finalize_run()
7. Run the full test suite

## Verification
python -m pytest -q && python -m ruff check src/ && python -m mypy src/

context.architecture_notes: The compliance functions (default_turn_contract_compliance, evaluate_pre_action_narration_compliance) are currently in codex_harness_builder_adapter.py but are used by review_adapter.py and run_controller.py, creating coupling between the review layer and a specific builder implementation.
constraints: All 23 existing tests must still pass
No behavioral changes - only structural refactoring
The compliance functions must have identical behavior after the move

acceptance_criteria: src/spec_orch/domain/compliance.py exists with all compliance functions
review_adapter.py imports from domain.compliance, not from codex_harness_builder_adapter
RunController has a _finalize_run method used by all three public methods
No duplicated gate->explain->report logic remains in the three public methods
